/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/roslib-test_package.dir/test/package.cpp.o -o /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslib/lib/roslib/roslib-test_package   -L/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib  -L/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/roslib/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib:/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/roslib/gtest:/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/roslib/gtest/lib:/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslib/lib gtest/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0 /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslib/lib/libroslib.so /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librospack.so -lpython3.10 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -ltinyxml2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0 -lrt
